testcase.name: TestPsiEveIntegratedStartStopTwice
testcase.failure: === RUN TestPsiEveIntegratedStartStopTwice agentlog_test.go:567: Error Trace: /pillar/agentlog/agentlog_test.go:567 Error: Not equal: expected: 200 actual : 404 Test: TestPsiEveIntegratedStartStopTwice agentlog_test.go:568: Error Trace: /pillar/agentlog/agentlog_test.go:568 Error: "Memory PSI collector is not running\n" does not contain "Memory PSI collector stopped" Test: TestPsiEveIntegratedStartStopTwice --- FAIL: TestPsiEveIntegratedStartStopTwice (5.24s)

testcase.name: TestGoroutinesMonitorUpdateParamsKeepStatsDecrease
testcase.failure: === RUN TestGoroutinesMonitorUpdateParamsKeepStatsDecrease watcher_test.go:409: Expected log output to contain 'Resizing stats slice to 720' watcher_test.go:409: Expected log output to contain 'Removing 720 oldest entries' Failed to write to log, write |1: file already closed --- FAIL: TestGoroutinesMonitorUpdateParamsKeepStatsDecrease (3.24s)

skipped.message: === RUN TestCreateMountPointExecEnvFiles time="2025-02-07T00:46:34Z" level=info msg=NewContainerdClient time="2025-02-07T00:47:04Z" level=error msg="NewContainerdClient: could not create containerd client. failed to dial \"/run/containerd/containerd.sock\": context deadline exceeded: connection error: desc = \"transport: error while dialing: dial unix:///run/containerd/containerd.sock: timeout\"" oci_test.go:818: test must be run on a system with a functional containerd --- SKIP: TestCreateMountPointExecEnvFiles (30.02s)
